title: Enable anti-CSRF token
remediation:
Set the following property 'glide.security.use_csrf_token' as true.

For setting ServiceNow properties, see Add system property documentation.
remediationImpact: This remediation enables an extra validation step before the instance user submits a write request to the instance. Every write request contains a CSRF token (i.e a validation/CSRF ID tied to the user session). When the user session expires, the secure token expires with it.
